ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "crim_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "zn" INTEGER /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq. ft. */,
  "indus" REAL /* Industrial proportion of the area */,
  "chas" INTEGER /* Charles River dummy variable (1 if tract bounds river; 0 otherwise) */,
  "nox" REAL /* Nitric oxides concentration (parts per 10 million) */,
  "rm" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "age" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "dis" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "rad" INTEGER /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "tax" INTEGER /* Full-value property tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "ptratio" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "b" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of Black residents */,
  "lstat" REAL /* Percentage of lower status of the population */,
  "new_col" REAL /* A new column for additional analysis */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale */,
  "last_sale_price" REAL /* Price of the last sale */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Zoning code of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of green space in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transport_accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility to public transport (e.g., distance to the nearest bus stop or train station) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime data was recorded */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes reported */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes reported */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes reported */,
  "drug_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of drug-related crimes reported */,
  "arrests" INTEGER /* Number of arrests made */,
  "crime_severity_index" REAL /* Composite index of crime severity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the neighborhood */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the neighborhood */,
  "income_inequality_index" REAL /* Gini coefficient or similar measure of income inequality */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Average education level (e.g., percentage of population with a college degree) */,
  "home_ownership_rate" REAL /* Percentage of homes that are owner-occupied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the house */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "forecast_period" TEXT /* Period for which the prediction is made (e.g., 1 year, 5 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_price_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictions_model ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_price_predictions_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_accessed" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (e.g., specific query parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_model" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for prediction */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" INTEGER /* Version of the model */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "features_used" TEXT /* Features used in the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
